claims.quote: The fellowship in general neurology will consist of 1 year of intensive exposure to all aspects of diseases of the nervous system, both central and peripheral, inpatient and outpatient.
claims.claimText: General neurology fellowship is 1 year covering central/peripheral, inpatient/outpatient nervous system diseases.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship program description — post-graduate trainee content.

claims.quote: The Headache fellowship offered at the University of Miami Miller School of Medicine, Department of Neurology is accredited by the United Council of Neurologic Subspecialties.
claims.claimText: Headache fellowship at Miller SOM Neurology is UCNS-accredited.

claims.quote: The University of Miami, in partnership with Jackson Health System, is committed torecruiting exceptional fellows across a wide range of subspecialties.
claims.claimText: UM partners with Jackson Health System to recruit fellows across subspecialties.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship recruitment partnership statement — trainee tier.

claims.quote: The Division offers a Neuropsychology Training and Research Program which is actively engaged in graduate teaching and supervision of doctoral students and post-doctoral fellows in clinical neuropsychology.
claims.claimText: Neuropsychology Training and Research Program trains doctoral students and post-doc fellows in clinical neuropsychology.

claims.quote: A myriad of fellowship opportunities encompassing clinical care and basic and clinical research are available.
claims.claimText: Multiple fellowship opportunities in clinical care and research are available.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: General fellowship availability statement — trainee tier.

claims.quote: The University of Miami Movement Disorders Fellowship is a 1 – 2 year fellowship program that aims to provide fellows a broad exposure to various movement disorders in order to become proficient in the management of complex movement disorders.
claims.claimText: Movement Disorders Fellowship is 1–2 years with broad exposure to complex movement disorders.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Subspecialty fellowship duration and content — trainee tier.

claims.claimText: Listed fellowships include Gastroenterology and Transplant Hepatology.
